name: Almond Poppyseed Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the bread machine according to its instructions.
2. Add all ingredients except almonds into the bread pan, following the order suggested by your bread machine's guidelines.
3. Set the machine for white bread with a medium crust setting and press Start.
4. Add the almonds at the beep or after the first kneading cycle.
